name: statplay
description: Interactive cyberpunk visualizer for introductory statistics — covers standard normal, 中心極限定理, confidence intervals, hypothesis testing, regression, and Bayes.

scripts.build:prod: npm run build && npm run minify
scripts.test: node scripts/test_routing.mjs && node scripts/test_math.mjs && node scripts/test_a11y_map.mjs && node scripts/test_a11y_canvas.mjs && node scripts/test_a11y_aria.mjs && node scripts/test_content_guards.mjs && node scripts/test_cf_function.mjs
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:layout && npm run test:a11y && npm run test:e2e
